title: Henbrandt 24 x Children’s Bubble Tubs with Wands 50ml Bubble Magic Party Bubbles Kids Toys Summer Fun Outdoor Game Party Favour Loot Bag Fillers Summer Games for Girls and Boys
features: Display box of 24 Magic Bubble Tubs for kids with attached bubble wands.
These bubble tubs for children make great party bag fillers for kids’ parties, lucky dip prizes, outdoor games, summer BBQ, classroom rewards, and stocking fillers.
The bottles of kids’ bubble mix come in 4 assorted colours: Blue, Pink, Purple and Yellow. Each display box contains 6 of each colour.
Recommended for ages 3+. Adult supervision is advised.
description: Product description These bubble tubs for kids are ideal party bag fillers, loot bag treats, classroom rewards, pinata prizes, and stocking fillers. The bubbles make a great outdoor game for sunny days and summer BBQs. Dip the wand in the bubble solution and gently blow to fill the air with iridescent bubbles of all shapes and sizes! Each tub of kids’ party bubbles contains 50ml of bubble solution and a bubble wand is included, handily clipped to the lid of the tub so it will never get lost. Display box of 24 kids’ bubble tubs. The mini bubble tubs come in 4 colours: Blue, Pink, Purple and Yellow. Each display box contains 6 of each colour, so you will receive 6x Blue, 6x Pink, 6x Purple, and 6x Yellow. The bubble mix is recommended for use outside, as the bubble solution may stain some fabrics – take appropriate precautions if using bubbles indoors. Do not leave children unsupervised with bubble mix. Bubble solution is not for internal consumption. Not suitable for children under the age of 3. This product carries the UKCA mark and is compliant with all applicable UK and EU safety requirements. Indications Summer Fun Outdoor Game, Entertainment for Children, Party Accessory, Creative Play Activity Directions 1. Remove the bubble tub from the display box. 2. Dip the attached wand into the bubble solution. 3. Gently blow through the wand to create bubbles. 4. For outdoor use only, and adult supervision is advised. See more
